presets.name: Mentions
presets.children: <Message.Mention variant="user">@all</Message.Mention>{' please welcome '}<Message.Mention variant="self">@Lucille Sanchez</Message.Mention>{' to the team this week!'}

default.message: Default renders an avatar, label, message body, and relative timestamp.

no_avatar.message: When avatarName and avatarUrl are omitted, Message uses the compact non-avatar layout.

grayscale.message: avatarGrayscale desaturates the avatar while keeping avatar status visible.

timestamp_object.message: timestampObject emits a Date instance in generated JSX for humanized timestamp behavior.

hover.message: Hover uses global hover and spacing props alongside the Message-specific props.

mentions.message: Mentions are composed as Message.Mention children with user and self variants.
